description: Receipt (fiscal?) for Abū l-Mūnā b. Ibrāhīm al-Malījī (?) Bū l-Ḥusayn b. Sulaymān [tawliya al-shadd??]. Ends with ḥamdala and ṣalwala, with no registration requests or marks. Perforation marks for binding.  Needs further examination. Written on the back of a section of a letter (PGPID 35781).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
